message.content:
Subject: Request for Repair - [Apartment Number]

Dear [Landlord's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to inform you about a repair that needs to be addressed in our apartment. I understand that you are likely busy, and I would appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Specifically, [describe the issue, being as detailed as possible without being overly technical, if you have this information]. I noticed this issue [state when you first noticed it, if relevant] and have been trying to resolve it myself, but I believe professional maintenance is necessary.

I would prefer to resolve this as soon as possible to ensure everything in the apartment is in good working order and safe to use. Please let me know if you require any additional information or if there is a specific time you would like to arrange for someone to come and take a look.

Thank you for your timely response and support.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Apartment Number]
[Your Contact Information]
